user_choices:
q1: Simple email/password login with JWT stored in cookies (no external providers)
q2: Minimal seed (1-2 funds, 3-4 companies) — user will add real data themselves
q3: Light theme (clean, minimal, white backgrounds)
q4: Admin-only view for now — accelerator uses it internally to review all funds
task-plan:
## Task: Advanced Features & Polish

### What to build:
1. **TanStack Query hooks** in `lib/hooks/` for client-side data fetching/caching
2. **Export functionality** (CSV/PDF) in a new reports section
3. **Fund comparison view** - compare multiple funds side by side
4. **Error boundaries** - React error boundaries for graceful error handling
5. **Loading states** - Skeleton loading components for all pages
6. **Responsive mobile design** - Mobile sidebar (hamburger menu), responsive tables, etc.
7. **Environment variables** setup

### Files to create/modify:
- Install: @tanstack/react-query, jspdf, jspdf-autotable
- lib/hooks/use-dashboard.ts, use-funds.ts, use-positions.ts, use-valuations.ts
- lib/query-provider.tsx (TanStack Query provider)
- app/(dashboard)/reports/page.tsx (reports with export)
- app/(dashboard)/compare/page.tsx (fund comparison)
- components/dashboard/error-boundary.tsx
- components/dashboard/loading-skeletons.tsx
- components/dashboard/mobile-nav.tsx (mobile hamburger)
- Update layout.tsx for responsive + query provider
- Update sidebar-nav.tsx for mobile responsiveness
- Update all pages with loading.tsx files
